children.name: Lambda expression in api.steps.BuildSteps expected the predicate to return <true> but it returned <false> for input of <Build(id=1, buildTypeId=NYMddaqN, number=null, state=queued, status=null, statusText=null, href=/app/rest/buildQueue/id:1, webUrl=http://localhost:8111/build/1, agent=null)> within 3 minutes.
